meta.title: What's in A Fighter Pilot's Bag?
meta.description:
Have you ever wondered what's in the bag that fighter pilots take with them?

The first 1000 people to use this link will get a free trial of Skillshare Premium Membership: https://skl.sh/hasardlee05211

*Opinions are mine and mine alone and do not represent the United States Air Force or any other organization*
